mapper.sql:
WHERE sm.schedule_status = 'Y'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no
AND l.addr1 LIKE '%제주%'
AND (l.addr1 LIKE '%서울%' OR l.addr1 LIKE '%경기%' OR l.addr1 LIKE '%인천%')
AND l.addr1 LIKE '%강원%'
AND (l.addr1 LIKE '%경상%' OR l.addr1 LIKE '%부산%' OR l.addr1 LIKE '%대구%' OR l.addr1 LIKE '%울산%')
AND (l.addr1 LIKE '%전라%' OR l.addr1 LIKE '%광주%')
)
AND (sm.schedule_title LIKE '%' || #{searchInput} || '%' OR m.nickname LIKE '%' || #{searchInput} || '%')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_main sm JOIN member m ON sm.member_no = m.member_no

SELECT sm.schedule_no, sm.schedule_title, TO_CHAR(sm.schedule_startdate, 'yyyy.mm.dd') AS scheduleStartdate, TO_CHAR(sm.schedule_enddate, 'yyyy.mm.dd') AS scheduleEnddate, sm.schedule_visibility, sm.create_date AS createDate, sm.member_no, m.nickname AS memberNickname,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_sub ss WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no) AS placeCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nice n WHERE n.post_no = sm.schedule_no AND n.post_board_fx = 'SR') AS likeCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply r WHERE r.post_no = sm.schedule_no AND r.post_board = 'S' AND r.status = 'Y') AS replyCount,
(SELECT l.firstimage2 FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS firstImage,
(SELECT l.addr1 FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS firstAddr,
(SELECT LISTAGG(l.mapx || ',' || l.mapy, ';') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_seq) FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no AND l.mapx IS NOT NULL AND l.mapy IS NOT NULL AND ss.schedule_sub_date = ( SELECT MIN(schedule_sub_date) FROM schedule_sub WHERE schedule_no = sm.schedule_no )) AS coords
FROM schedule_main sm JOIN member m ON sm.member_no = m.member_no
ORDER BY sm.create_date DESC OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{listLimit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT sm.schedule_no, sm.schedule_title, sm.schedule_startdate, sm.schedule_enddate, sm.create_date AS createDate, sm.member_no, m.nickname AS memberNickname,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_sub ss WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no) AS placeCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nice n WHERE n.post_no = sm.schedule_no AND n.post_board_fx = 'SR') AS likeCount,
(SELECT l.addr1 FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS firstAddr,
(SELECT LISTAGG(l.mapx || ',' || l.mapy, ';') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq) FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no AND l.mapx IS NOT NULL AND l.mapy IS NOT NULL) AS coords
FROM schedule_main sm JOIN member m ON sm.member_no = m.member_no WHERE sm.schedule_no = #{scheduleNo}

SELECT ss.schedule_sub_date AS subDate, ss.schedule_sub_seq AS subSeq, l.title, l.addr1, l.mapx AS mapX, l.mapy AS mapY FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = #{scheduleNo} ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq
